data.author: Fiona MacDonald, Anthony Di Paola, Bloomberg
data.title: UAE and Kuwait start oil output cuts after Hormuz blockage
data.description: Kuwait’s oil cutback started with about 100,000 barrels a day as of early Saturday and is expected to almost triple on Sunday.
data.content: The United Arab Emirates and Kuwait started reducing oil production, as the near-closure of the crucial Strait of Hormuz ripples through energy markets and affects global supply.  Abu Dhabi National … [+3378 chars]
